## Future-dev comments

- [ ] Toi da them/doi moi comment `WHY` cho moi block logic khong tu giai thich duoc ma PR nay cham vao.
- [ ] Moi magic number, regex, fallback, workaround moi deu co comment ngay gan no.
- [ ] Neu PR cham vao code legacy kho hieu, toi da backfill comment cho chinh block vua sua.
- [ ] Neu cham vao OCR flow, toi da test lai regression phu hop hoac ghi ro vi sao chua test duoc.
